scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @treasurer/api && npm run build -w @treasurer/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @treasurer/web && npm run lint -w @treasurer/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @treasurer/web && npm run typecheck -w @treasurer/api
scripts.docker:up:dev: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file docker/ports.host.dev.env up -d
scripts.docker:db-migrate: docker compose build db-migrate && docker compose run --rm db-migrate
scripts.docker:db-backfill-event-og: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.default.env run --rm db-backfill-event-og
scripts.docker:db-backfill-event-og:dev: docker compose --profile tools -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file docker/ports.host.dev.env run --rm db-backfill-event-og
scripts.docker:db-backfill-event-og:staging: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.staging.env run --rm db-backfill-event-og
scripts.docker:db-backfill-event-og:production: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.production.env run --rm db-backfill-event-og
scripts.docker:verify-account: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.default.env run --rm verify-account
scripts.docker:verify-account:dev: docker compose --profile tools -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file docker/ports.host.dev.env run --rm verify-account
scripts.docker:verify-account:staging: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.staging.env run --rm verify-account
scripts.docker:verify-account:production: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.production.env run --rm verify-account
scripts.docker:deposit-reconciliation: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.default.env run --rm --build deposit-reconciliation
scripts.docker:deposit-reconciliation:dev: docker compose --profile tools -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file docker/ports.host.dev.env run --rm --build deposit-reconciliation
scripts.docker:deposit-reconciliation:staging: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.staging.env run --rm --build deposit-reconciliation
scripts.docker:deposit-reconciliation:production: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.production.env run --rm --build deposit-reconciliation
scripts.docker:event-admin: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.default.env run --rm event-admin
scripts.docker:event-admin:dev: docker compose --profile tools -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file docker/ports.host.dev.env run --rm event-admin
scripts.docker:event-admin:staging: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.staging.env run --rm event-admin
scripts.docker:event-admin:production: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.production.env run --rm event-admin
scripts.docker:reconcile-raised-amounts: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.default.env run --rm reconcile-raised-amounts
scripts.docker:reconcile-raised-amounts:dev: docker compose --profile tools -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file docker/ports.host.dev.env run --rm reconcile-raised-amounts
scripts.docker:reconcile-raised-amounts:staging: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.staging.env run --rm reconcile-raised-amounts
scripts.docker:reconcile-raised-amounts:producti: docker compose --profile tools --env-file docker/ports.host.production.env run --rm reconcile-raised-amounts
